office_does: The auditor administers elections, recording, licensing, and county financial processes.
race_blurb: Brielle Joyce faces financial-industry professional Charlee Paull.

candidates.summary: Joyce is a filed candidate without a detailed biography or platform in the approved dossier.
Paull has banking and mortgage experience and emphasizes audits, transparent elections and records, accountability, and professional administration.
highlights: Supports accurate audits and transparent administration [S2].

spending.basis: Accurate audits and accountability supply an oversight direction.

experience.basis: She has relevant financial experience but no documented auditor-office record.
